zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Coningsby於大約1388年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布福德時，他的父親Thomas Coningsby30歲，母親Blanch Hawcliffe18歲。他和Elizabeth Whethill至少有2個兒子。他去世於1461年享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Coningsby was born about 1388, in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Coningsby, was 30 and his mother, Blanch Hawcliffe, was 18. He had at least 2 sons with Elizabeth Whethill. He died in 1461, at the age of 74.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Coningsbyが約1388年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Coningsbyは30歳，母Blanch Hawcliffeは18歳であった。彼はElizabeth Whethillとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1461年に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Coningsby(이)가 대략 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Coningsby(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanch Hawcliffe(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Whethill(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1461년 74세의 나이로 사망했다.
